prompts.description: Ensure the repository includes all required InnerSource compliance files.
prompts.prompt:
This repository must include the following files in the root directory:
- README.md: High-level project overview and functionality.
- LICENSE: Open-source license file.
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md: Contributor behavior guidelines.
- CONTRIBUTION.md: Contribution process, moderation, and quality management.

prompts.description: Ensure the repository follows the required folder structure.
prompts.prompt:
The repository must include the following folders:
- src/: Source code
- tests/: Unit tests
- docs/: Documentation
- scripts/: Build, test, or deployment scripts

The repository must include a sonar-project.properties file with valid configuration.
SonarQube analysis should be integrated into the CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions.
Add a badge to the README.md showing the current quality gate status.

prompts.description: Ensure GitHub issue templates are present.
prompts.prompt:
The repository must include issue templates for bug reports and feature requests.
These should be located in the .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ directory.
